name: Qualified Terminable Interest Property (QTIP) Election

eligibility.description: The surviving spouse must be entitled to all income for life, and the executor must make an irrevocable election on the estate tax return.

actionability.retroactive_note: Action required during tax year — verify if still applicable

description: Allows an estate to claim the marital deduction for property in which the spouse has a life income interest, while the decedent controls the ultimate disposition of the remainder.
